heading: Distribution of assets on dissolution or final liquidation
label: 30712 Distribution of assets on dissolution or final liquidation
text: On dissolution or final liquidation of the corporation, any assets remaining after the discharge of all liabilities shall be used by the board of directors for the purpose stated in or be transferred to a recognized educational foundation.section 30702 of this title
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)3071236:515., .July 19, 1954, ch. 536, § 1568 Stat. 492The word “satisfaction” is omitted as included in “discharge”, and the word “obligations” is omitted as included in “liabilities”. The word “outstanding” is omitted as unnecessary.
